heading: Administrative Assistant
label: 8018 Administrative Assistant
text: The Secretary of the Navy may appoint an Administrative Assistant in the Office of the Secretary of the Navy. The Administrative Assistant shall perform such duties as the Secretary may prescribe.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8018 was renumbered .section 9018 of this titleAnother prior section 8018, added , , , prescribed compensation of General Counsel of Department of the Air Force, prior to repeal by , , , eff. first day of first pay period beginning on or after .
